name: Austin (United States)

colors.symbolism: the stylised civic emblem and inscription at the centre

description: A white field bearing the stylised red wordmark 'AUSTIN' with an accompanying red lone star at the centre.
history: Austin, the capital of Texas, uses a simple white-and-red municipal flag featuring the city's name and a Lone Star.

features.symbolism: The city's name 'AUSTIN' rendered as the central device, accompanied by a Lone Star evoking Texas; honours Stephen F. Austin, the 'Father of Texas', for whom the state capital is named.
